setup.content:
To: morgan.chen@example.com
Subject: Re: following up

Hi Morgan,

Thanks for the note -- I'll have an answer for you by Friday.

Best,
Connor

notes: delegate has no --repo -- scribe reads/writes agents.rs's vault_root() (~/Desktop/antfarm-memory), Connor's live operational vault, not a disposable worktree. Skipped by default (livesInVault); set EVAL_ALLOW_LIVE_VAULT=1 to actually run this against the real vault. Setup writes into the REAL active/drafts/ dir (root: vault) -- the runner deletes exactly that seeded file again in its finally block after grading, but does not touch anything else already in that directory.
